keys.description: Per-branch active athlete roster. Read by SDUI list screens + the branch manager's dashboard.
Cross-branch tenant-wide roster for HR dashboards.
Athletes currently snapshotted into an age group. Feeds team-invite forms + enrollment eligibility widgets.
The Athletes for a User across every tenant. Used by the `/me/athletes` endpoint to render the caller's 'my kids' + self-view surface. Feeds guardian dashboards.
Athletes whose consent_recorded_at is within 30 days of expiry (only when athlete_consent_workflow entitlement on). Feeds the tenant admin's compliance dashboard.
Athletes currently in status=paused. Feeds the safeguarding officer's dashboard.

The current medical cluster values. Cached at the ATHLETE level (not the caller level) — the redactor pipeline applies AT egress based on caller permissions, so the underlying cached value is the raw payload. Consumers reading this cache MUST apply the redactor.
keys.notes: Sensitive-tier cache — Redis eviction policy allkeys-lru is inappropriate; use allkeys-lfu with a dedicated Redis DB for medical caches so LRU pressure elsewhere doesn't evict + re-fetch (each re-fetch is an audit-relevant read).

keys.description: The nightly age-group snapshot for an athlete. Read-hot by enrollment forms + roster previews.
